description: Style NoteLinos Perros' sought after contemporary cool is epitomised in this funky belt - guaranteed to add a finishing polish to the simplest springtime ensembles. Cinch it around your waist or hips (to suit your outfit's silhouette) and match it with tonal jewellery.Product DetailsBlack perforated upper with a plastic buckleTang clasp with a loopHoles to customise the FitMaterial and CareSmooth plasticWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSize and FitLength at largest setting: 102 cm
